policy: YAGNI gate for direct dependencies (see docs/harness/engineering-principles.md ladder step 4). Every direct dependency in package.json and the root Cargo.toml workspace policy must have a one-line reason a few lines of our own code could not replace it. Local workspace path dependencies are excluded. Adding an external direct dependency requires a matching entry; harness:check fails on any direct dependency without one and on any entry whose dependency was removed. Backfilled entries describe each library's role; small replaceable dependencies are tracked for review in docs/plans/tech-debt-tracker.md (DRY-002).

npm.@dnd-kit/core: Accessible drag-and-drop primitives for the application Kanban board.
npm.@dnd-kit/utilities: Shared helpers required by the @dnd-kit packages.
npm.@tauri-apps/api: Tauri IPC bridge between the React UI and Rust commands.
npm.@tauri-apps/plugin-dialog: Native file and message dialogs from the renderer.
npm.@tauri-apps/plugin-notification: Native desktop notifications from the renderer.
npm.dompurify: Sanitizes untrusted HTML (job descriptions, resume preview) before render.
npm.recharts: Charts for hiring-trends and salary views.
npm.web-vitals: Measures core web vitals for local performance checks.
npm.@storybook/addon-vitest: Runs Storybook stories as Vitest tests.
npm.@storybook/react-vite: Storybook framework for React plus Vite.
npm.@tauri-apps/cli: Builds and runs the Tauri desktop app.
npm.@vitejs/plugin-react: React fast-refresh and JSX support for Vite.
npm.@vitest/browser-playwright: Playwright provider for Vitest browser mode.
npm.autoprefixer: Adds CSS vendor prefixes via PostCSS.
npm.globals: Shared global variable definitions for ESLint config.
npm.husky: Git hooks runner for pre-commit checks.
npm.jsdom: DOM environment for Vitest unit tests.
npm.lint-staged: Runs linters on staged files during pre-commit.
npm.postcss: CSS transformer used by Tailwind and autoprefixer.
npm.vite: Frontend build tool and dev server.

cargo.tauri: Desktop app runtime and IPC framework.
cargo.chacha20poly1305: Authenticated encryption for local data at rest.
cargo.zeroize: Wipes secret material from memory after use.
cargo.async-trait: Async methods in traits for scraper adapters.
cargo.reqwest: HTTP client for scrapers and source fetches.
cargo.scraper: HTML parsing for job source adapters.
cargo.urlencoding: URL query encoding for source requests.
cargo.regex: Pattern matching across parsing and validation.
cargo.sqlx: Async SQLite access with compile-time-checked queries.
cargo.libsqlite3-sys: SQLite native bindings required by sqlx.
cargo.thiserror: Derive macro for typed domain errors.
cargo.anyhow: Ergonomic error propagation outside domain error types.
cargo.sha2: SHA-256 hashing for integrity and dedup keys.
cargo.hex: Hex encoding for hashes and tokens.
cargo.scopeguard: Runs cleanup reliably on scope exit.
cargo.dirs: Locates per-OS data and config directories.
cargo.docx-rs: Reads and writes DOCX resume files.
cargo.quick-xml: Fast XML parsing for DOCX and feeds.
cargo.zip: Reads and writes zip archives (DOCX containers, exports).
cargo.chromiumoxide: Drives a user-controlled browser for manual import and automation.
cargo.candle-core: Local ML tensor runtime for optional on-device models.
cargo.hf-hub: Downloads local model files from the Hugging Face Hub.
cargo.arboard: Clipboard access for support reports and the bookmarklet.
cargo.tempfile: Temporary files for safe atomic writes.
cargo.objc2: Objective-C runtime bindings for macOS integration.
cargo.objc2-local-authentication: macOS LocalAuthentication for biometric and keychain gating.
cargo.wiremock: Mock HTTP server for scraper tests.
